# Terra Home Studio

> Thoughtfully designed ceramic vessels, tableware, and minimalist home decor objects crafted for calm living.

This website serves as the online catalog, inventory manager, and branch store locator for Terra Home Studio's premium handcrafted ceramic products.

## Core Navigation

- [Collections](/prop) - Curated minimalist home decor collections, ceramic vases, and objects.
- [About Us](/about) - Our design philosophy, simplification commitment, and background story.
- [Journal & Design Insights](/journal) - Articles on styling guides, minimalist decor design, and database systems.
- [Contact Studio](/contact) - Address, telephone, email, and showroom location maps in Thailand.

## Dynamic Features & API
- Access the barcode scanner utility at `/sys-diag` to search individual items inside our Supabase inventory catalog.
- Stock availability and pricing are tracked across multiple Bangkok-Nonthaburi branches in Thailand.
